author.bio: Tech-writer, circle-pitter, terrible person. Educating devs @IPFSbot @protocollabs.
author.name: Johnny Matthews

content.text:
Regular URLs are dumb. The person that makes a file has to decide what it's called and then tell everyone.

Content identifiers (CIDs) make it so everyone can agree what a file is called, without having to talk to each other.

Ergo, #IPFS is great for introverts.
